_brief.notesForCursor: Treat _brief as the creative direction. Render everything else as content. Client has no logo, no photos, no existing site — design must work entirely from typography, colour, and SVG flourishes. Do not use stock photography under any circumstances. Owner is Harrison Lelli — a young, hands-on sole operator. Voice should reflect that: genuine, unpretentious, competent.

designDirection.vibe: Local Adelaide property care business — gardening, pressure washing, gutter cleaning. Clean, premium-but-down-to-earth, trustworthy. Young owner who takes real pride in his work. Not a franchise, not a big crew — just one person doing it properly.
designDirection.voice: Direct, honest, no-nonsense. Young Adelaide tradie voice — not try-hard, not corporate. Should sound like Harrison wrote it himself: confident about quality without bragging. 'Get the GreenEdge' energy.
designDirection.audience: Adelaide homeowners who want reliable, tidy property maintenance done by someone who actually cares. Newton / eastern suburbs core, but willing to travel anywhere in metro.

typography.displayPreference: Bold modern serif display — Fraunces variable, DM Serif Display, or similar. Should feel premium-warm, not corporate. A touch of character in the letterforms.
typography.bodyPreference: Clean geometric sans (Inter, Outfit, or similar). Highly readable.
typography.notes: Pair a confident serif display with a clean sans body. Avoid all-caps headlines. Sentence case feels more human and trustworthy for a service business.

palette.mood: Earthy and grounded — deep forest green + warm terracotta on a light, natural background
palette.primary: Deep forest green around #1F3D2B (used for primary CTAs, brand mark, headlines)
palette.secondary: Warm terracotta / clay around #C2410C (used for accent highlights, eyebrows, sticker badges)
palette.highlight: Lime green around #65A30D for checkmarks and trust marks
palette.background: Warm off-white / paper around #FAFAF7 — NOT pure white. Should feel natural, like recycled card.
palette.card: Pure white #FFFFFF or very light cream

heroPreference.description: No photography. Headline is the visual anchor — large, confident serif display. Add a subtle SVG botanical decoration: a curved hedge silhouette running along the bottom of the hero in brand green at low opacity, or a leaf cluster mark in the corner. Optional 'GPC' monogram in a circular mark on the right side. No stock photos.

loved.what: Premium tradie sites that feel like a real person built them — bold type, plenty of white space, confident colour use. No agency-stamp gradient backgrounds or generic stock shots.

competitors.name: Jim's Mowing
competitors.notes: What we DON'T want to be — corporate, franchise, generic. We're small, local, owner-operated.

references.avoid: Stock photography of immaculate suburban lawns. Generic green/blue gradients. Italicised script fonts. All-caps everything. Sterile corporate aesthetic. Anything that looks like a franchise template.

specialFeatures: Services section covering Gardening, Pressure Washing, and Gutter Cleaning — 3 services, not 6
Where We Work section noting metro-wide coverage (Harrison said 'Anywhere')
Owner card in story section — Harrison Lelli, owner-operator, 1 year in
Trust marks in the hero (Fully Insured, Free Quotes, Owner-Operated)
Phone number prominent in header (click-to-call) — tradies convert on calls, not forms

_meta.notes: Harrison Lelli owner-operator. 1 year in business. ABN: 87 823 119 154. Based Newton SA 5074. Services: gardening, pressure washing, gutter cleaning. No logo, no photos, no existing site.

business.name: GreenEdge Property Care
business.shortDescription: Owner-operated gardening, pressure washing, and gutter cleaning across Adelaide.

hero.heading: Get the GreenEdge.
hero.body: Gardening, pressure washing, and gutter cleaning across Adelaide. Owner-operated, fully insured, free quotes.

graphic.description: Headline as the visual anchor. Subtle SVG botanical motif — a curved hedge silhouette along the bottom of the hero in brand green at low opacity, or a leaf cluster mark in the corner. Optional 'GE' monogram in a circular mark on the right side. No stock photos.

services.heading: Services
services.subhead: Gardening, pressure washing, gutter cleaning — all done properly, by one person who gives a damn.

items.title: Gardening & Lawn Care
items.description: Mowing, edging, weeding, hedging, and garden maintenance. Weekly, fortnightly, or one-off.
items.longDescription:
A tidy garden changes how a property feels — and in Adelaide's growing season, it takes more than the occasional mow to keep it looking sharp. Harrison handles the full picture: mowing at the right height, clean edges along paths and beds, weeding before it gets away from you, and hedging that actually looks intentional.

Most clients book fortnightly through spring and summer, then drop back to monthly over winter. One-off cuts before a sale, a party, or after a stretch away are welcome too.

Everything gets blown down before he leaves. No clippings on the driveway.
items.imageAlt: Neatly mowed and edged suburban lawn
includes: Mowing at the correct height for your lawn type
Edging along paths, driveways, and garden beds

items.title: Pressure Washing
items.description: Driveways, paths, patios, fences, and hard surfaces blasted clean.
items.longDescription:
Pressure washing is one of those jobs that makes an immediate difference — a grey driveway goes back to looking new, pavers stop being a slip hazard, and the whole front of the property lifts. Harrison does driveways, paths, patios, pool surrounds, fences, and outdoor entertaining areas.

Pre-sale clean-ups are a specialty. A pressure wash costs a fraction of a repaint and often has more visual impact than anything else you can do before open inspections.

All runoff is managed and surfaces are checked before the job starts — no pressure washing surfaces that can't handle it.
includes: Patios, pool surrounds, and entertaining areas
Soft wash option for delicate surfaces

items.title: Gutter Cleaning
items.description: Gutters cleared of leaves, debris, and blockages. Downpipes checked and flushed.
items.longDescription:
Blocked gutters are one of the most common causes of water damage to Adelaide homes — and one of the most ignored until something goes wrong. Harrison clears leaves, twigs, and debris from gutters, checks and flushes downpipes, and flags anything that looks like it needs attention before it becomes a bigger problem.

Most Adelaide properties need a clean at least twice a year — once after autumn leaf fall and once before the summer storm season. Single-storey and double-storey properties both serviced.

Debris is bagged and removed. You'll get a quick rundown on condition after every clean.
includes: Debris bagged and removed from site

usage.heading: Across Adelaide
usage.subhead: Based in Newton, happy to travel. If you're in metro Adelaide, get in touch — chances are we cover your area.

whyUs.title: Owner-operated
whyUs.description: Harrison does every job himself. No subbies, no strangers at your house — the same person every time.

whyUs.title: Fully insured
whyUs.description: Public liability covered. Work done properly and backed up.

whyUs.title: Tidy finish, every time
whyUs.description: Green waste removed, hard surfaces blown down, site left clean. Every job, no exceptions.

whyUs.title: Free quotes, no pressure
whyUs.description: Come out, look at the job, give you a straight price. No obligation.

story.heading: One person. One standard.
story.body:
GreenEdge Property Care is Harrison Lelli — a young Adelaide tradie with a passion for gardening and a thing about doing work properly.

It started simply: a genuine love of making outdoor spaces look their best, and a frustration with services that cut corners or send whoever's available that week. GreenEdge is the answer to that — one person, consistent quality, real care for every yard he works on.

One year in and growing. If you want your property looking sharp, call Harrison.

cards.title: Owner-operated
cards.description: Harrison does every job himself. You know who's coming.

cards.title: Est. 2025
cards.description: Young business, serious about building a reputation on results.

items.question: Do you provide free quotes?
items.answer: Yes. Harrison comes out, looks at the job, and gives you a straight price. No obligation.

items.question: What areas do you service?
items.answer: Based in Newton — happy to travel across metro Adelaide. If you're not sure whether we cover your area, just call.

items.question: Do you do one-off jobs or only regular maintenance?
items.answer: Both. One-off clean-ups, pre-sale tidy-ups, and regular maintenance schedules are all available.

items.question: Are you insured?
items.answer: Yes. Fully covered with public liability insurance.

items.question: Do you bring your own equipment?
items.answer: Yes — all tools and equipment supplied. You don't need to provide anything.

items.question: What happens if it rains on my scheduled day?
items.answer: We'll reschedule within the week. No charge for weather delays.

items.question: Do I need to be home?
items.answer: Not unless you want to be. Most clients just leave access and we send a photo when done.

items.question: How does payment work?
items.answer: Invoice after the job, payable by bank transfer or card.

contactSection.heading: Get a free quote
contactSection.subhead: Tell us what you need. Harrison will get back to you within one business day.
